name: protein-lab
description: AF Server, Feishu task, and experiment guardrails for Protein Lab.

interface.longDescription: Protein Lab helps Codex turn Feishu research tasks into local rounds, plan AlphaFold Server experiments, interpret raw AF results, refine peptide or fragment candidates, write Chinese reports, and capture project-specific guardrails from postmortems.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me run a Protein Lab research task from experiment design through AF Server interpretation and reporting.
